title: BLE transport: callbacks access transport_state after disconnect could race
notes: Fixed race by guarding callback pointer copy with `if (transport_state.initialized)` under mutex in connected_cb:130, disconnected_cb:159, security_changed_cb:197 (lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.c). Prevents stale ctx access post-deinit. Test builds pass (Kconfig aside). Commit in 1bf33f2c7.
close_reason: Implemented guard for initialized state before copying conn_cb/user_ctx in all BLE connection callbacks under mutex protection. Resolves use-after-free race with deinit. Verified in code at lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.c:130-135 etc. Related P3/P4 beads in same file addressed in prior passes.
